_meta.purpose: Source of truth for the 14 destination countries surfaced in tools-landed-cost.html
_meta.vat_source: OECD Consumption Tax Trends 2025 + national tax authorities (rates current as of 2026-Q2)
_meta.customs_source: World Bank Doing Business — trading across borders 2025; ERGSN trade desk operational averages

destinations.fta_status: KORUS — most products duty-free at HS chapter level

destinations.customs_fee_note: DTA (Derecho de Trámite Aduanero) 0.8% of customs value
destinations.fta_status: MFN only — no Korea-Mexico FTA in force as of 2026-Q2

destinations.customs_fee_note: No federal customs processing fee; CBSA brokerage applies
destinations.fta_status: KCFTA — most products duty-free at HS chapter level

destinations.customs_fee_note: AFRMM 8% of freight + SISCOMEX fees + PIS/COFINS-Importação ~9.25%
destinations.fta_status: MFN only — Korea-Mercosur FTA in negotiation

destinations.customs_fee_note: No general customs processing fee under FTA-eligible imports
destinations.fta_status: KCHFTA — Korea's first FTA, in force since 2004; nearly all goods duty-free

destinations.customs_fee_note: GCC common external tariff applies; AED 100-300 customs declaration fee
destinations.fta_status: Korea-UAE CEPA signed 2024 — verify ratification status with destination broker

destinations.customs_fee_note: GCC common external tariff applies; SABER + SASO conformity required
destinations.fta_status: MFN only — Korea-GCC FTA in negotiation
RCEP — staged tariff reduction; chapter coverage varies

destinations.customs_fee_note: Customs handling fee minimal; importer pays VAT at clearance
destinations.fta_status: KVNFTA + KAFTA + RCEP — multiple coverage; bilateral KVNFTA most favourable

destinations.customs_fee_note: Customs handling THB 100-200; importer pays VAT at clearance
Customs handling IDR 50,000-200,000; importer pays VAT at clearance
destinations.fta_status: KAFTA + KIDFTA (in force 2023) + RCEP — comprehensive coverage

destinations.customs_fee_note: Customs documentary stamp + IPF; importer pays VAT at clearance
No EU-wide customs processing fee; member-state broker fees apply
destinations.fta_status: KEUFTA — nearly all industrial goods duty-free since 2011

destinations.customs_fee_note: No UK customs processing fee; freight forwarder broker fees apply
destinations.fta_status: KUKFTA — replicates KEUFTA preferences post-Brexit (in force 2021)
